claims.claim: CRME has a measurable baseline performance profile across multiple evaluation metrics.
The decisions component exhibited the largest aggregate degradation under the evaluated ablation settings.
The relations component ranked second in aggregate ablation degradation.
The sessions component exhibited a lower aggregate degradation than the two highest-ranked components.
The artifacts component exhibited the lowest aggregate degradation among the evaluated components.
The current evidence does not establish that CRME statistically significantly outperforms a baseline system.
claims.note: No inferential statistical test, confidence interval, or hypothesis test is present in the current evidence package.

claims.claim: The evaluated component ranking provides comparative evidence of heterogeneous component contribution but does not establish definitive causal importance.
claims.note: Ablation results support comparative contribution analysis but should not be interpreted as definitive causal estimates.
